hooks.command: node -e "const j=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'));if(!j.agent_id){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'BOSS PROTOCOL: You are the orchestrator. Delegate file modifications to specialist subagents (model=sonnet for implementation, model=haiku for trivial fixes). Direct edits are acceptable ONLY for 1-line trivial changes or plan/draft markdown files.'}}))}"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');try{const briefingIdx='.briefing/INDEX.md';if(!fs.existsSync(briefingIdx)){process.exit(0)}const counterFile='.briefing/.work-counter';let counter=0;if(fs.existsSync(counterFile)){counter=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(counterFile,'utf8').trim(),10)||0}counter++;fs.writeFileSync(counterFile,String(counter));const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);let todayCount=0;for(const sub of['decisions','learnings']){const d='.briefing/'+sub;if(fs.existsSync(d)){todayCount+=fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>{try{return fs.statSync(d+'/'+f).mtime.toISOString().slice(0,10)===today}catch(e){return false}}).length}}const prevFile='.briefing/.prev-entry-count';let prev=0;if(fs.existsSync(prevFile)){prev=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(prevFile,'utf8').trim(),10)||0}if(todayCount>prev){fs.writeFileSync(counterFile,'0');fs.writeFileSync(prevFile,String(todayCount));process.exit(0)}fs.writeFileSync(prevFile,String(todayCount));if(counter>=20&&todayCount===0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'[BriefingVault] BLOCKED: '+counter+' file edits this session, 0 decisions/learnings written to .briefing/. Write at least one entry to .briefing/decisions/ or .briefing/learnings/ NOW to continue.'})+'\n')}else if(counter>=10&&todayCount===0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'[BriefingVault] MANDATORY: You have made '+counter+' file edits this session and written no decisions/learnings to .briefing/. Write at least one decision or learning NOW before continuing. See rules/common/knowledge-vault.md.'}})+'\n')}process.exit(0)}catch(e){process.exit(0)}"
hooks.description: BriefingVault enforcer: warns at 10 edits, blocks at 20 edits if no decisions/learnings written today

hooks.command: node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'VERIFICATION REQUIRED: Subagent finished. (1) Read changed files yourself, (2) Run tests/diagnostics to verify, (3) Only then mark task complete. Agent execution auto-logged to .briefing/agents/agent-log.jsonl.'}}))"
node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'Teammate idle. Check TaskList — if all tasks done, send shutdown_request. If tasks remain, send next instructions.'}})"
node -e "console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'Task completed. Verify deliverable exists and check quality before accepting.'}})"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='.briefing';if(!fs.existsSync(p+'/INDEX.md')){process.exit(0)}const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);const sDir=p+'/sessions';const hasLog=fs.existsSync(sDir)&&fs.readdirSync(sDir).some(f=>f.startsWith(today));const agentLog=p+'/agents/agent-log.jsonl';const hasWork=fs.existsSync(agentLog)&&fs.readFileSync(agentLog,'utf8').split('\n').filter(l=>l.trim()).some(l=>{try{return JSON.parse(l).ts&&JSON.parse(l).ts.startsWith(today)}catch{return false}});if(hasWork&&!hasLog){console.log(JSON.stringify({decision:'block',reason:'Meaningful work detected but no session log in .briefing/sessions/. Write a session summary before ending.'}))}"
hooks.description: BriefingVault: block session end if work done but no session summary

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');try{if(!fs.existsSync('.briefing/INDEX.md')){process.exit(0)}const counterFile='.briefing/.work-counter';let counter=0;if(fs.existsSync(counterFile)){counter=parseInt(fs.readFileSync(counterFile,'utf8').trim(),10)||0}if(counter===0){process.exit(0)}const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10);let todayCount=0;for(const sub of['decisions','learnings']){const d='.briefing/'+sub;if(fs.existsSync(d)){todayCount+=fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>{try{return fs.statSync(d+'/'+f).mtime.toISOString().slice(0,10)===today}catch(e){return false}}).length}}if(counter>0&&todayCount===0){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{additionalContext:'[BriefingVault] Reminder: '+counter+' file edits this session, 0 decisions/learnings written to .briefing/ today. Consider writing a decision or learning entry as you work.'}})+'\n')}process.exit(0)}catch(e){process.exit(0)}"
hooks.description: BriefingVault reminder: advisory notice if edits made but no briefing entries today
